messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0149",
  "title": "2025年度实力出海应用",
  "page_index": 45,
  "page_range": "45"
}

Section text:
## 2025年度实力出海应用

2025 Premier Chinese-developed Mobile Apps in Global Markets

message.content: This section serves as a bilingual heading that can answer questions regarding: **Topic** (premier Chinese-developed mobile applications achieving success in international markets), **Date** (2025), and **Entities** (Chinese-developed mobile apps and global markets). The excerpt contains no definitions, procedures, specific claims, app names, metrics, tables, figures, or evidence types, functioning solely as a title label for subsequent content.
